lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Look at the sun and see the clouds turn to faces in the sky
lyrics.translation: 远望艳阳   仰望那苍穹的云卷云舒  变幻出人脸模样

lyrics.text: We've been awake all night, shattered dreams all around
lyrics.translation: 我们彻夜未眠   四周飘荡着梦的碎片

lyrics.text: Close your sad, sad eyes we will be safe and sound
lyrics.translation: 合上你布满忧愁的双眼    我们会安然无恙

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Look at the sun and see the clouds turn to faces in the sky
lyrics.translation: 远望艳阳   仰望那苍穹的云卷云舒   变幻出人脸模样

lyrics.text: Daydreaming lightly through the rainAll's forgiven on a summer train
lyrics.translation: 白日梦轻轻地穿透雨滴  所有的一切都能被谅解   在这夏日的列车上

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Seems we are a thousand miles away from last night
lyrics.translation: 似乎我们已和昨夜相距千里

lyrics.text: As you sigh in my ear, kiss the rain goodbye
lyrics.translation: 你在我耳边轻叹   与雨滴吻别

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Look at the sun and see the clouds turn to faces in the sky
lyrics.translation: 远望艳阳   仰望那苍穹的云卷云舒   变幻出人脸模样

lyrics.text: Daydreaming lightly through the rain
lyrics.translation: 白日梦轻轻地穿透雨滴

lyrics.text: All's forgiven on a summer train
lyrics.translation: 所有的一切都能被谅解   在这夏日的列车上

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right just breathe
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧   清浅呼吸间    一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right you'll see
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧    你将看到   一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: And the windows are cryin'  but this train is flyin'  us all through the rain I fear
lyrics.translation: 窗外风声呼啸   但列车却载着你我在雨幕中穿梭

lyrics.text: And the sky is getting brighter with every mile
lyrics.translation: 这苍穹   也随着列车的行进而渐渐明亮

lyrics.text: And it all seems clear
lyrics.translation: 一切变得清晰

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Look at the sun and see the clouds turn to faces in the sky
lyrics.translation: 远望艳阳   仰望那苍穹的云卷云舒   变幻出人脸模样

lyrics.text: Daydreaming lightly through the rain
lyrics.translation: 白日梦轻轻地穿透雨滴

lyrics.text: All's forgiven on a summer train
lyrics.translation: 所有的一切都能被谅解    在这夏日的列车上

lyrics.text: Come with me for a little ride, see the shadows passing by
lyrics.translation: 与我一同坐火车离开吧    看着车窗外呼啸而过的掠影

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right just breathe
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧   清浅呼吸间    一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right you'll see
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧    你将看到    一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right just breathe
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧   清浅呼吸间     一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: Come away with me, it's gonna be all right you'll see, you'll see
lyrics.translation: 与我一同远走高飞吧    你将看到   一切都会好起来

lyrics.text: Come away with me
lyrics.translation: 与我一同   远走高飞吧
